name: Baker Technology Limited
summary: Baker Technology Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and provides specialized marine offshore equipment and services for the oil and gas industry in the Asia Pacific, Africa, the Middle East, America, Singapore, China, and internationally. Its products and services include offshore pedestal cranes; steel products and components, including rack chords and pinions; ancillary equipment, such as elevating systems, skidding systems, raw water towers, and winches; and mechanical handling equipment, as well as design and engineering services. The company also designs, constructs, operates, and charters mobile offshore units, offshore supply vessels, and critical equipment and components for the offshore marine industry; and provides offshore marine logistics support services. In addition, it offers engineering services and other services, such as project management, quality assurance, maintenance and repair, and construction supervision services. The company was formerly known as Wassall Asia Pacific Limited and changed its name to Baker Technology Limited in July 2000. Baker Technology Limited was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Singapore.
